effects: Move flagship between strategic map grids via warp. Duration varies by distance.
constraints: Cannot enter star system grid directly from long distance - must warp to adjacent grid first
Minimum range (항속) of 100 required
Long-distance warp may have arrival error (lands in adjacent grid)
Not available during tactical game

effects: Replenish flagship fuel (항속). Must be at planet or fortress.
constraints: Must be docked at planet or fortress
Wait time 8 game hours

effects: Move flagship to another planet within the same star system.
constraints: Must be in the same star system
Wait time 8 game hours

effects: Reduce disorder/confusion rate among stationed ground forces.
Increase fleet space navigation training level (항주 훈련도).
Increase ground unit training level (육전 훈련도).
Increase carrier fighter unit training level (공전 훈련도).
Acquire or improve ground tactics skill for the commander.
Acquire or improve fighter tactics skill for the commander.
Deploy stationed ground forces to increase planet or fortress security rate (치안율). Wait 24 game hours.
constraints: Requires stationed ground units
Wait 24 game hours before effect

effects: Increase planet security through force. Side effect: may reduce government approval (지지율).
constraints: Reduces government approval as side effect
Wait 24 game hours

effects: Hold a military parade with stationed ground forces. Increases government approval rate (지지율).
constraints: Requires stationed ground units
Wait 24 game hours

effects: Requisition military supplies from an occupied enemy planet or fortress.
constraints: Only on occupied enemy territory
Wait 24 game hours

effects: Reinforce guard at a specific checkpoint spot. Duration 24 game hours.
constraints: Effect lasts 24 game hours
Tied to specific spot

effects: Deploy ground unit from planet or fortress onto the battlefield.
constraints: Requires ground units stationed at planet/fortress

effects: Withdraw ground unit from the battlefield back to planet or fortress.
constraints: Ground forces deployed during tactical retreat remain behind

effects: Move character to a different facility within the current planet.
constraints: Must be on a planet
Cannot move to facility outside current planet

effects: Move character to a different spot (room) within the same facility.
constraints: Must be within same facility

effects: Change character classification from military (군인) to politician (정치가). Cannot enlist for 30 game days after.
constraints: Cannot re-enlist (지원) for 30 game days
Military rank and cards retained but inactive

effects: Change character classification from politician to military. Rank set to Major (소좌). Flagship changed to battleship.
constraints: Must be currently classified as politician
Cannot be done within 30 game days of retirement (퇴역)

effects: Defect to the enemy faction. Character is detained at enemy capital, awaiting punishment decision (처단). Entire address book is deleted.
constraints: Address book (주소록) is completely cleared
Character arrives at enemy capital in detention
Awaits 처단 (execution/punishment) decision

effects: Meet with another character in the same spot. Increases mutual friendship (우호도).
constraints: Target character must be in same spot
Target must be online

effects: Study at the Officer Academy. Increases one ability parameter.
constraints: Must be at Officer Academy (사관학교)
Parameter increase depends on course subject

effects: Tactical simulator training at Officer Academy. Raises tactical skill level.
constraints: Must be at Officer Academy (사관학교)

effects: Coup system step 1: Declare rebellious intent. Character becomes coup initiator (수모자). Can then execute 모의, 설득, and 반란.
constraints: Detectable by 사열 command
High political risk if detected

effects: Coup system step 2: Invite a character in the same spot to join the coup. Target can accept (참가) or refuse.
constraints: Must have declared 반의 first
Target must be in same spot

effects: Coup system step 3: Raise the rebellion loyalty of fleet units under the coup initiator's command.
constraints: Must have declared 반의 first
Applies to own fleet units only

effects: Coup system step 4: Execute the coup attempt. Creates rebel faction. Success or failure determined by accumulated loyalty and resources.
constraints: Must have declared 반의 first
Failure results in most participants being killed
Rebel faction is separate from regular faction count

effects: Join a coup after accepting a 모의 (conspiracy) invitation.
constraints: Must have received and accepted a 모의 invitation

effects: Inject personal private funds (사적 자금) into one of three targets: 지방자금고 (local planet treasury), 신임 박스 (confidence/no-confidence in current ruler), 지지 박스 (support next ruler candidate).
constraints: Requires private funds in personal account
Three distinct target boxes

effects: Spend evaluation points (평가 포인트) to purchase a new flagship of a higher class.
constraints: Costs evaluation points in addition to PCP
Must have sufficient evaluation points

effects: Draft a military operation targeting a star system. Operation types: 점령 (capture), 방위 (defense), 소탕 (sweep). CP cost varies by activation timing.
constraints: Cannot create duplicate target operations on same card
소탕 작전 can only target lone ships (독행함)
Total participating units must not exceed own available units
Cannot assign to operations whose activation time has not yet been reached (발령)

effects: Cancel a drafted operation before it is executed.
Assign units and resources to a planned operation. Operation ends 30 game days after issuance.
constraints: Cannot assign to operations whose activation time has not been reached
Operation expires 30 game days after issuance

effects: Form a new fleet, patrol force, transport fleet, or ground unit. Assign commander and staff.
constraints: Sufficient ships and crew must be available
Staff positions must be filled per unit type

effects: Dissolve an existing fleet or unit. Ships returned to planet warehouse.
Instructor teaches at Officer Academy. Target student's ability parameter increases. Effect lasts 120 game hours.
constraints: Must be at Officer Academy (사관학교)
Duration 120 game hours
Ends early if instructor leaves the spot
Requires academy instructor position card

effects: Create a transport package plan targeting a specific planet or fortress.
constraints: Sufficient supplies and transport units required

effects: Cancel a previously created transport plan.
Repair flagship and all units in the fleet. Consumes all available military supplies (군수물자).
constraints: Consumes all available military supplies
Must be at planet or fortress

effects: Resupply a target unit with military supplies from available warehouse stock.
constraints: Requires supplies in warehouse

effects: Reorganize unit composition within a fleet. Transfer ships between units.
constraints: Cannot execute while allocation (할당) is in progress
Allocation cannot start while reorganization or replenishment is in progress

effects: Replenish ship losses in a unit. Crew auto-replenished. Only one ship class can be replenished per command.
constraints: Replenishment source must be same sub-type (e.g., Cruiser Type-I needs Cruiser Type-I)
Only one ship class per command execution
Cannot run while allocation is in progress

effects: Transfer cargo packages between planet warehouse and unit warehouse (in/out).
constraints: Cannot execute while allocation is in progress

effects: Allocate resources from planet/fortress warehouse to specific fleet units.
constraints: Cannot allocate while reorganization, replenishment, or cargo transfer is active
Requires governor or fortress admin director card

effects: Promote a character one rank following the merit ladder order. All position cards except Personal, Captain, and Fief are lost on promotion.
constraints: Must be highest merit holder in current rank tier
All cards except Personal, Captain, and Fief are lost
Rank caps apply per faction

effects: Promote a character not at the top of the merit ladder by one rank, bypassing normal order.
constraints: Requires high-authority card (군무상서 or higher)
All cards except Personal, Captain, and Fief are lost

effects: Demote a character by one rank. Their merit (공적) is reduced to 100. All cards except Personal, Captain, and Fief are lost.
constraints: Merit reset to 100 after demotion
All cards except Personal, Captain, and Fief are lost

effects: Grant a noble title to a character of noble birth (귀족/제국기사 출신). Titles: 제국기사 → 남작 → 자작 → 백작 → 후작 → 공작.
constraints: Empire only
Target must be of noble or imperial knight birth (출자)
Requires Emperor card

effects: Award a military decoration (훈장) to a character. Higher decoration affects rank ladder tie-breaking (Law 3).
constraints: Affects rank promotion tie-breaking order

effects: Appoint a character to a position, granting the corresponding position card. Appointing authority varies by position.
constraints: Target must meet minimum rank requirements for the position
Appointing authority varies by position (see rank-based appointment table)

effects: Remove a character's position card (dismiss from their role). The card is lost.
constraints: Requires the same appointing authority that originally appointed the character

effects: Voluntarily relinquish and lose one's current position card.
constraints: Personal and Captain cards cannot be resigned

effects: Grant a planet as a personal fief to a Baron-rank (남작) or higher noble. The noble receives a Fief Card (봉토 카드) which persists through promotion/demotion.
constraints: Empire only
Target must hold Baron (남작) rank or higher
Requires Emperor card
Fief Card persists through promotion and demotion

effects: Reclaim a noble's fief planet back to direct imperial control. The noble loses their Fief Card.
constraints: Empire only
Requires Emperor card
Noble loses Fief Card upon reclamation

effects: Host an evening party at the capital mansion. Invitees' influence (영향력) values change.
constraints: Must be at capital mansion (수도 저택)
Empire only

effects: Host a hunt at fief planet mansion. Increases invitees' friendship (우호도) and changes influence.
constraints: Must be at fief planet mansion (봉토 행성 저택)
Requires Fief Card
Empire only

effects: Host a summit meeting at a hotel. Invitees' influence (영향력) values change.
constraints: Must be at a hotel

effects: Host a private dialogue at a hotel. Increases invitees' friendship (우호도) and changes influence.
constraints: Must be at a hotel

effects: Give a public speech at the central plaza. Affects both influence (영향력) and government approval (정부 지지율) — can increase or decrease depending on 정치 stat.
constraints: Must be at central plaza (중앙광장)

effects: Set a strategic objective for the entire faction. Directs faction-wide operations.
constraints: Requires supreme command authority

effects: Change the faction-wide tax collection rate (납입률). Affects funds income from all planets.
constraints: Faction-wide effect
Requires finance authority

effects: Adjust tariff rates for specific trade commodities on trade routes.
constraints: Per trade item adjustment
Requires finance authority

effects: Transfer aid funds from national budget to a specific planet or fortress.
constraints: Requires sufficient national budget
Target specific planet or fortress

effects: Decide the fate of a detained character: execute, imprison, or release. Final step of the arrest system.
constraints: Target must be in detention (체포된 상태)
Requires judicial authority

effects: Conduct diplomatic negotiations with Fezzan. Affects trade routes, neutral territory relations.
constraints: Requires Fezzan diplomatic envoy card or supreme command
Fezzan is neutral territory — violations incur penalties

effects: Present a strategic governance goal for a specific planet or fortress. Guides local administration priorities.
constraints: Targets specific planet or fortress only
Lower cost than national goal (80 vs 320)

effects: Conduct a mass search of the current planet or fortress. Reveals hidden/infiltrating characters.
constraints: Affects current planet or fortress only

effects: Register a specific character on the arrest list (체포 리스트). Step 1 of the formal arrest process.
constraints: Empire 헌병총감: can arrest any military except 원수
Empire 내무상서: can arrest military 대령 and below
Empire 사법상서: can arrest politicians
Alliance 헌병사령관: can arrest any military
Alliance 법질서위원장: can arrest politicians

effects: Grant a specific character authority to execute an arrest from the arrest list. Step 2 of the arrest process.
constraints: Must have performed 체포 허가 first
Grants arrest authority to a designated agent

effects: Attempt to physically arrest a character at the same spot or in the same unit. Step 3 of the arrest process.
constraints: Target must be at same spot or in same unit
Requires prior 집행 명령 authorization
Target must be on the arrest list

effects: Inspect for coup attempt indicators. Detects characters with 반의 (rebellious intent) status. Counter-coup tool.
constraints: Can detect 반의 status in characters at current location

effects: Assault an enemy-faction character at the same spot. Success probability depends on 정보 stat and target's abilities.
constraints: Target must be enemy faction character
Target must be at same spot

effects: Place surveillance on a character at the same spot. Surveillance continues until the watcher is detected.
constraints: Target must be at same spot when started
Duration continues until surveillance agent is detected

effects: Infiltrate a restricted spot on a friendly planet to gather information or prepare operations.
constraints: Small-scale infiltration within same faction territory
Detection is possible

effects: Attempt to escape from the current infiltrated spot and return to normal status.
constraints: Must currently be in an infiltrated location

effects: Gather intelligence at an infiltrated facility and transmit it back to home base.
constraints: Must be in an infiltrated location
Intelligence transmitted to home faction

effects: Plant a timed explosive device at the infiltrated facility. Damages target facility after delay.
constraints: Must be in an infiltrated location
Timed explosive — delay before detonation

effects: Agitate local citizens to reduce government approval rate (정부 지지율) at current location.
constraints: Must be on enemy territory or infiltrated location

effects: Attempt to infiltrate an enemy planet or fortress. Success allows executing intelligence operations inside.
constraints: Targets enemy planet or fortress
Higher risk than 잠입 공작
Detection leads to arrest

effects: Attempt to return to own faction's territory after being on an enemy planet.
constraints: Must currently be on enemy territory
Failure results in capture and detention

effects: Move flagship and selected units to target position. Speed determined by ENGINE energy allocation.
constraints: Speed influenced by ENGINE energy channel allocation

effects: Change facing direction while maintaining position. Turn speed depends on 기동 parameter.
Move sideways while maintaining current facing direction. Movement speed is 50% of normal.
constraints: Speed is 50% of normal movement speed

effects: 180-degree turnaround. Speed after reversal depends on 기동 parameter. Longer wait time than normal turn.
constraints: Wait time 10 seconds (double normal)

effects: Begin warp preparation for tactical retreat. Takes 2.5 minutes (150 seconds). Only units within max command range at execution time are included. Ground forces on planet surface remain behind.
constraints: Must be outside radar circle to execute retreat
WARP energy channel must be at maximum
Only units within command range at execution are included
Ground forces deployed on planet remain behind
Other commands can be issued during 2.5-minute preparation

effects: Immediately halt all movement and actions for selected units. Stationary units auto-activate concentrated recon and electronic warfare.
constraints: Instant execution (0 second wait)
Stationary units gain recon bonus and ECM bonus

effects: Issue formation order to fleet units within command range. Units outside range complete current order then halt.
constraints: Units with morale ≤ 20 (confusion state) do not respond to formation orders
Units outside command range circle cannot receive new orders

effects: Issue attack orders. Automatic fire against enemies within range. Does NOT automatically attack planets or fortresses.
constraints: Does not auto-attack planets or fortresses
Targets enemies within weapon range automatically

effects: Manually designate a target for a one-time strike with specified weapon type.
constraints: Manual target designation — one-time strike
Weapon output affected by BEAM/GUN energy channel allocation

effects: Order carrier-based fighters to launch and engage. System automatically determines anti-ship or interception mode.
constraints: Requires carriers (전투정모함/항공모함) in fleet
Mode auto-selected: anti-ship vs interception

effects: Launch units stationed at planet or fortress into the tactical battle. Ship units sortie first (random order among ship types). Duration: 20 seconds per unit.
constraints: Duration: 20 seconds per unit
Ship units sortie before others
Sortie order among ship types is random

subTypes.effect: Attack power +, Recon range -, Morale drain rate +

effects: Change fleet operational posture. Combat posture increases attack but reduces recon and accelerates morale drain.
constraints: Wait time 10 seconds
Combat posture reduces recon range

effects: Repair damage to the flagship in tactical battle.
constraints: Consumes repair materials

effects: Resupply ammunition and materials to the flagship in tactical battle.
constraints: Requires supply materials

effects: Fire the fortress main cannon at enemy fleet units. Only available to the fortress defense commander.
constraints: Fortress defense commander only
Must be at a fortress (요새) — not regular planets
